metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4183
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 1E shows the association of Mover with synaptic vesicles by pre-embedding immunogold labeling. The supporting paper (PMID 23723986) shows immunogold localization of mover to the cytoplasmic surface of synaptic vesicles in a biochemical synaptic vesicle preparation.

18/01/2021 Dnyanada: The specificity of the anti-mover antibody was verified in S2, where western blot analyses showed an almost complete loss of Mover protein upon KD-shRNA expression while expression of the mismatched control shRNA had no effect as compared to wild-type controls.. Experimental description: Sprague Dawly rats were injected with AAV particles into the VCN at P2 as described earlier (p. 530; Exp. Procedues). P12/P13 rats previously injected with AAV particles ... (p. 530)
